name: trucking
instructions:
["Ned is a trucker who delivers construction supplies for two clients, Hammerco and Brick Works. Every day, he receives an order from both companies to pick up bricks on the other side of Middleview river. To get there, he must cross the Middleview bridge which has a maximum weight capacity of 83 tons. So, if Hammerco and Brick Works together need more than 83 tons of bricks, Ned has to take two trips across the river that day.

Based on the average amount of brick Hammerco and Brick Works each need per day, Ned often has to take two trips across the river.","We will show you how many tons of bricks Hammerco and Brick Works ordered on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether Ned took two trips across the river.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many tons of bricks are ordered by each company on average."]

Based on the average amount of brick Hammerco and Brick Works each need per day, Ned often has to take two trips across the river.","We will show you how many tons of bricks Hammerco and Brick Works ordered on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. At the end of each block, you will be asked how many tons of bricks are ordered by each company on average."]

["Ned is a trucker who delivers construction supplies for two clients, Hammerco and Brick Works. Every day, he receives an order from both companies to pick up bricks on the other side of Middleview river. To get there, he must cross the Middleview bridge which has a maximum weight capacity of 83 tons. So, if Hammerco and Brick Works together need more than 83 tons of bricks, Ned has to take two trips across the river that day.

Based on the average amount of brick Hammerco and Brick Works each need per day, Ned often has to take two trips across the river.","We will show you how many tons of bricks Hammerco and Brick Works ordered on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether Ned took two trips across the river.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many tons of bricks are ordered by each company on average."]

To get there, he must cross the Middleview bridge which has a maximum weight capacity of 83 tons. So, if Hammerco and Brick Works together need more than 83 tons of bricks, Ned has to take two trips across the river that day.

Based on the average amount of brick Hammerco and Brick Works each need per day, Ned often has to take two trips across the river.","We will show you how many tons of bricks Hammerco and Brick Works ordered on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether Ned took two trips across the river.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many tons of bricks are ordered by each company on average."]
